questions.question: How many PTO days do full-time employees accrue per year?
questions.reference_answer: Full-time employees accrue 15 days of paid time off per calendar year, credited at 1.25 days per completed month.

questions.question: How much unused PTO can carry over to the next year?
questions.reference_answer: Up to 5 days can carry over; any balance beyond that is forfeited on December 31st.

questions.question: How many days per week can an employee work remotely without manager approval?
questions.reference_answer: Up to 3 days per week without prior manager approval; 4-5 days requires written approval renewed annually.

questions.question: What is the reimbursement threshold above which an expense needs pre-approval?
questions.reference_answer: Expenses of $75 or more require manager pre-approval before the expense is incurred.

questions.question: Where should IT support requests be sent?
questions.reference_answer: To helpdesk@examplecorp.internal or through the IT Service Portal, not directly to individual IT staff.

questions.question: How many days does a new employee have to enroll in benefits?
questions.reference_answer: 30 days from their start date, unless a qualifying life event reopens a new 30-day window.

questions.question: How long does non-standard equipment take to fulfill for a new hire?
What is the minimum password length required by the security policy?
questions.reference_answer: A minimum of 14 characters, including an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

questions.question: How quickly must a suspected data breach be reported to the Security team?
questions.reference_answer: Within 1 hour of discovery, via the incident hotline, not email.

questions.question: Within how many hours must affected clients be notified of a confirmed Tier 3 data breach?
questions.reference_answer: Within 72 hours of confirming the breach.

questions.question: Are personal phones allowed to access Tier 3 restricted data?
questions.reference_answer: No, personal devices are not permitted to access Tier 3 data under any circumstances.
